reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Ascochinga is a beautiful place to stop.

reviews.comment:
Excelentes las instalaciones, todo impecable en cuanto a la limpieza y no es de ahora, hace años que visito el lugar y está siempre en idénticas condiciones. Productos variados y combustible siempre disponible. El trato del personal invita a volver siempre.

(Translated by Google)
The facilities are excellent, everything is spotless, and this isn't just a recent change; I've been visiting for years and it's always in the same condition. They have a wide variety of products and fuel is always available. The staff's friendly service makes you want to come back again and again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13471578260485529773/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpbWJyZmdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una atención siempre muy gentil, por suerte aún mantenemos esencia de pueblo.

(Translated by Google)
The service is always very kind; luckily, we still maintain the essence of a small town.
